params.name: organization_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the Contentstack organization.

params.name: filter
params.description: SCIM filter expression for searching users. Example: userName eq "user@example.com"

items.docs: Retrieves all users in the organization following the SCIM 2.0 ListResponse format. Supports filtering by userName (email address) using the filter query parameter for user lookup during IdP sync operations.

params.name: organization_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the Contentstack organization.

items.docs: Provisions a new user in the Contentstack organization via SCIM. The user is created with the attributes provided in the SCIM User resource and assigned to the organization's default role unless group mappings specify otherwise.

params.name: organization_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the Contentstack organization.

params.name: user_id
params.description: The SCIM user ID of the user within the organization.

items.docs: Retrieves the SCIM User resource for a specific user by their SCIM user ID within the organization.

params.name: organization_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the Contentstack organization.

params.name: user_id
params.description: The SCIM user ID of the user within the organization.

items.docs: Fully replaces a SCIM user resource with the provided attributes. All attributes not included in the request will be cleared or reset to defaults following SCIM 2.0 PUT semantics.

params.name: organization_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the Contentstack organization.

params.name: user_id
params.description: The SCIM user ID of the user within the organization.

items.docs: Partially updates a SCIM user resource using SCIM 2.0 PATCH operations. Commonly used to activate or deactivate users by setting the active attribute, or to update specific profile attributes without replacing the entire resource.

params.name: organization_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the Contentstack organization.

params.name: filter
params.description: SCIM filter expression for searching groups. Example: displayName eq "Editors"

items.docs: Retrieves all groups in the organization following the SCIM 2.0 ListResponse format. Supports filtering by displayName for group lookup during IdP sync operations.

params.name: organization_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the Contentstack organization.

items.docs: Creates a new group in the Contentstack organization via SCIM. Groups can be mapped to specific roles and stacks in Contentstack to control member access permissions.

params.name: organization_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the Contentstack organization.

params.name: group_id
params.description: The SCIM group ID of the group within the organization.

items.docs: Retrieves the SCIM Group resource for a specific group by its SCIM group ID within the organization.

params.name: organization_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the Contentstack organization.

params.name: group_id
params.description: The SCIM group ID of the group within the organization.

items.docs: Fully replaces a SCIM group resource including all member assignments. Use this to synchronize the complete group membership from the IdP.

params.name: organization_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the Contentstack organization.

params.name: group_id
params.description: The SCIM group ID of the group within the organization.

items.docs: Partially updates a SCIM group using SCIM 2.0 PATCH operations. Commonly used to add or remove individual members from the group without replacing the entire membership list.

params.name: organization_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the Contentstack organization.

params.name: group_id
params.description: The SCIM group ID of the group within the organization.

items.docs: Removes a SCIM group from the Contentstack organization. Members of the group retain their individual user accounts but lose the role permissions granted by the group mapping.
Returns the SCIM schemas supported by the Contentstack SCIM API, enabling IdP clients to understand the available attributes for User and Group resources.
Returns the SCIM resource types supported by the Contentstack SCIM API including Users and Groups, enabling IdP clients to discover available endpoints and their schemas.
